Package lu.kbra.pclib.db.domain.dialect

Class AbstractSQLStructureVisitor

java.lang.Object
lu.kbra.pclib.db.domain.dialect.AbstractSQLStructureVisitor
All Implemented Interfaces:
SQLStructureVisitor, SQLStructureVisitorOptionsOwner
Direct Known Subclasses:
MySQLStructureVisitor, PostgreSQLStructureVisitor, SQLiteStructureVisitor
public abstract class AbstractSQLStructureVisitor extends Object implements SQLStructureVisitor
